title: HotbarAPI Compatibility
description: Compatibility patches between HotbarAPI and other mods
body:
This mod patches compatibility between [HotbarAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hotbarapi) and other mods.

It currently includes:
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) [1.20.1, 1.21.6]
- [Tough as Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails) [1.20.1, 1.21.6]
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) [1.20.1]
